nasb.text: In the same way the chief priests also, along with the scribes, were mocking Him among themselves and saying, “He saved others; He cannot save Himself.

esv.text: So also the chief priests with the scribes mocked him to one another, saying, “He saved others; he cannot save himself.

cnv.text: 祭司長和經學家也同樣譏笑他，彼此說：“他救了別人，卻不能救自己；

ccb.text: 祭司长和律法教师也嘲讽说：“祂救了别人，却救不了自己！

csbs.text: 同样，祭司长们也与经文士们一起嘲笑，相互说：“他救了别人，却不能救自己！
